MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.9 15 

CRNT_BIC_CD 

LABEL: Current Beneficiary Identification Code 

DESCRIPTION: The current beneficiary identification code (BIC) specifies the basis of the beneficiary’s eligibility for 
cash payment programs, mainly Social Security. When the individual qualifies under another person’s 
account (for example, as a spouse or child), the code identifies the type of
